label: ELA Proficiency
description: % students proficient in English Language Arts (grades 3-8), ILEARN 2025

label: ELA & Math Proficiency
description: % students proficient in both ELA and Math (grades 3-8), ILEARN 2025

label: Graduation Rate
description: 4-year adjusted cohort graduation rate, class of 2025

label: Chronic Absenteeism
description: % students chronically absent (missing 10%+ of school days), SY 2024-25
